data.title: BofA Sees Mostly Inline Q1 For Industrials, Highlights 3M, JCI, GE Vernova As Top Picks
data.description: The analysts expect industrial stocks to beat or meet expectations, with strong performances from distributors like Fastenal and MSCI.

data.title: Options Corner: A Rare Value Bet Tilts The Odds In Favor Of Alibaba Bears
data.description: Although Alibaba enjoyed a nice pop due to a brief respite in tensions, the U.S.-China trade war remains a key catalyst for BABA stock puts.

data.title: Mattel Shares Rise On WWE Licensing Deal Extension
data.description: Mattel shares are trading higher on Monday after the company announced a multi-year extension of its global licensing agreement with WWE, a subsidiary of TKO Group Holdings.

data.title: A US Recession In 2025? Betting Odds Say It's More Likely Than Not
data.description: Recession expectations for the US economy remain elevated despite Trump's efforts to ease tariffs, with a 56% chance of contraction by 2025.
